titleStmt.title: SII 18.66: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 66. (B.K. No. 3 of 1933-34.) BANKAPUR, SHIGGAON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in front of the Government Farm Office.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalladēva, is dated in Śaka 984, Śubhakṛit, Bhādrapada Amāvāsyā, Sunday, corresponding probably to A.D. 1062, July 8, Monday (not Sunday), on which day the Amāvāsyā commenced at. ·28.

It records a grant of money and certain taxes to the attendants (pādamūlaparivāra) (of the temple of Indrēśvara) made by paḍevaḷa Bīrayya, pergaḍe Ālimayya, pergaḍe Srīdharayya and others, with the permission of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Tōyiladēva of the Kadamba family when they were camping at Payiṭṭhāṇa. It is stated that pergaḍe Chāvuṇḍayya of Indrēśvarapura and others were called to that place at the time of making the gift. Paḍevaḷa Bīrayya is described as Kadamba-rājya samuddharaṇa.

Tōyiladēva is stated to be the governor of Banavāsi Twelve-thousand and Pānuṅgal Five-hundred. Varuṇaśivapaṇḍitadēva, the rājaguru of Bhuvanaikamalla was in charge of twelve (panneraḍu) bāḍa, the property of the temple of Indrēs11varadēva of Baṅkāpura.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmānandhāsuradhvaṁsī sṛṣṭisaṁhārakārakaḥ . pāyātkadaṁbavaṁśābjalakṣmīṁ kṣārakṣaṇakṣamaḥ © ©
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭā rakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddha mānamācandrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire © ©
svastiyamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīḷasaṁpannarappa śrī madbhuvanaikamalladēvara rājaguru śrī varu
ṇaśivapaṁḍitadēvar śrīmadbaṁkāpuradiṁdrēśvaradēvarggāḷva panneraḍubāḍamaṁ sukha saṁkathāvinōdadināḷuttamire © svasti samadhigatapaññamahā
śabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsīpuravarēśvaraṁ tryakṣakṣmāsaṁbhavaṁ caturāśītinagarā dhiṣṭhitalalāṭalōcanacaturbhbhuja jagadvikhyātāṣṭādasāsva
mēdhadīkṣita himavadgirīndrarundraśikharaśaktisaṁsthāpitasphaṭikasiḷāstaṁbha baddhamadagajamahā mahimābhirāmaṁ kādaṁbacakri ma
yūravarmmamahāmahīpāḷakulabhūṣaṇaṁpermmaṭṭitūryyanirghghōṣaṇaṁ sākhā carēndradhvajavirājamānōttuṁgasiṁhalāṁchanaṁ dattārtthikāṁca
naṁ samarajayakāraṇaṁ kadaṁbarābharaṇaṁ nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahā maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ tōyiladēva rbbanavāsipannicchāsiramumaṁ pā
nuṁgallaynūṟumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁge yyuttamire © tatpādapadmōpajīvi samastadustarārāti
mastakastagitanistriṁśakaukṣēyakavirājitapracaṇḍadōrddaṇḍaṁ mone muṭṭe gaṇḍaṁ maleya paḍevaḷabhujāsphāḷanakarāḷabhairavaṁ kadanakaṇṭhīravaṁ vīrāva
tāraṁ budhajanādhāraṁ tottaḷatuḷivaṁ gaṇḍaroḍḍaḷivaṁ niṭṭaḍevalla nāḷiṁge nallaṁ vairi maṇḍaḷikapaḍevaḷagaṇḍagaḷagarttari saṁgrāmasūtradhāri vīrarasa
viśadayaśōviḷāsaṁ maccaripa paḍevaḷegaḷakāḷapāśaṁ mūrvvaḷabhīmaṁ pratyakṣakāmaṁ mūtaṭṭi yiṟivaṁ sauryyamaṁ meṟevaṁ svāminī
bhṛtyaṁ kaliyugavikramādityaṁ raṇaraṁgakṣētrapāḷaṁ śaraṇāgatajanarakṣapāḷaṁ saucāṁja nēyaṁ samastamaleparājāśrayaṁ vairighara
ṭṭaṁ Arigana jattalaṭṭaṁ vairibaṁgāṟaṁ tōyiladēvanaṁkakāṟaṁ maṇḍalaṁgāvaṁ piridittu maṟevaṁ kadaṁbarājyasamuddharaṇaṁ śrīmatpaḍevaḷa bīrayyaṁgaḷuṁ samastarājya
bharasaṁpannarappa śrīmatperggaḍeyālimayyaṁgaḷu perggaḍe śrīdharayyapramukha samastapradhāna parigraha samētamirddu dharmmōtsāhacittaṁ pu
ṭṭi śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ tōyiladēvargge binnapaṁgeydu śrīmadindrēśvara purada perggaḍe cāvuṇḍayyanumaṁ nāgadēvayya seṭṭivaṁ nakarasāsirvvaraṁ bara
vēḷdaṭṭi payiṭṭhāṇadirkkebīḍinoḷ sakavarṣa 984 neya subhakritseṁvatsarada bhādrapadadamāvāsyeyumādityavāradandu pādamūla parivārakke
Alliya nakarakkaṁ Alliyagaradrammaṁ kiṟudeṟe kiṟukuḷāyaṁ dāyadrammaṁ Aḍigarccu kāṇike dēvara tōṁṭam sūḷeyarggāḷva kauṟūroḷagāgi palasū
raṁ sarvasamasyaṁ biṭṭarmaṁgaḷaṁ © © © Idaṁ pratipāḷisidātaṁge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētraṁ prayāgeyargghyatīrtthadoḷ sāyira kavileyaṁ brā
hmaṇargge dānaṁgoṭva phaḷamakkuṁ © Idanaḷidātaṁ vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāge yargghyatīrtthadoḷ sāyira kavilevaṁ sāyira brāhmaṇaru
maṁ sāyira tapōdha namumanaḷida pañcamahāpātakanakkuṁ © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharā ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāOriginally ma was written and then corrected to dha.
yatē krimi © bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā yādabhissarādibhi yasya yasya yadā bhūmi tasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ © sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnriyasya is written above the line.
pāṇā kāḷē kāḷē pāḷaniyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētān bhāginaḥ pārtthivēndrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ © © ©
© śrīvanitāḷaṁkāraṁ bhūviditavisuddhakīrtti nijapatipadapaṁkajātasatacaṁcarīkaṁ kēvaḷame jagejjayāvatāraṁ . naḍunāḍapaḍege koṁkaṇavaḍe
goḷagaṇa maleya paḍege vajrada paḍiyaṁtadi tolagadirddaneṁdaḍe paḍevaḷa bīraṁga moḷavē . ©
Digital edition of SII 18.66 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
